name: mpy-wasm
description: Real MicroPython WASM firmware runtime with a deterministic virtual clock (issue #37). Executes a design's firmware Python (setup()/loop()) through the actual MicroPython WebAssembly port, exposing JS-backed machine.Pin/machine.ADC/time bridges and a FirmwareModel-compatible step() so #38's CoSimOrchestrator can drive firmware ⇄ analog lockstep. No stub interpreter; real Python decides the GPIO.
